payload.title: Confetti burst when a ticket moves to done
payload.description: When any ticket transitions into the done column — local drop, programmatic update, or realtime push from another client — fire a tasteful confetti burst from the card's resting position. Design intent: tactile, restrained, and momentary; not a screen-flooding party. Considerations: use canvas-confetti or a hand-rolled lightweight emitter; tune particle count, palette, gravity, and decay so it reads as a satisfying punctuation mark rather than noise; trigger once per transition (don't re-fire on re-render); respect prefers-reduced-motion (skip entirely); should coexist cleanly with [[SCP-40]]'s move animation so the card lands and then bursts.
